description: Labeled ClawGuard scanner corpus. label=safe expects allow; label=risky expects block or manual_review (caught). expectedDecision is the exact clawguard.check.v1 decision for regression tests.

entries.label: safe
entries.reason: Benign SKILL.md with no risky patterns

entries.label: safe
entries.reason: Declared network access; governed policy yields manual_review not block

entries.label: safe
entries.reason: Plugin with runtime entry; governed policy requires manual_review before install

entries.label: safe
entries.reason: Metadata hygiene issue only; not a malicious bundle

entries.label: risky
entries.reason: Remote code execution and credential access in SKILL.md

entries.label: risky
entries.reason: postinstall script, git deps, suspicious package names

entries.label: risky
entries.reason: Undeclared install, env, and credential access

entries.label: risky
entries.reason: Missing runtime output, broad permissions, write capabilities

entries.label: risky
entries.reason: Shell execution, secrets, broad filesystem in MCP config

entries.label: risky
entries.reason: Workspace skill override with curl-pipe-to-bash and credentials

entries.label: risky
entries.reason: ClawHub lock/origin drift and missing origin metadata
